title: Senior Fleet Manager at Dunzo Logistics

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at Dunzo Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Dunzo Logistics! We are hiring a Fleet Manager for our Patna team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Dunzo Logistics:
Dunzo Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dunzo Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
